user: You are an emotional analysis system. Classify EACH of the following numbered messages into structured emotional labels.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object where keys are the message numbers (as strings) and values follow this schema:

{
  "primary_emotion": one of "joy", "sadness", "anger", "fear", "surprise", "disgust", "trust", "anticipation",
  "intensity": a float between 0.0 and 1.0,
  "feelings": a list of specific feelings,
  "desires": a list of what the person wants or needs,
  "actors": a list of people mentioned,
  "environment": the physical or social context,
  "domain": one of "personal", "work", "health", "social", "spiritual"
}

Messages:
[1] msg one
[2] msg two
